title: Collect, store and handle eggs from breeder flocks
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Collect, store and handle eggs from breeder flocks demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to handle eggs

pcs.text: Confirm and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a poultry breeding farm or facility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a poultry breeding farm or facility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a poultry breeding farm or facility.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks, and control and/or report risks related to handling, collecting, sorting, packing and storing eggs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks, and control and/or report risks related to handling, collecting, sorting, packing and storing eggs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks, and control and/or report risks related to handling, collecting, sorting, packing and storing eggs.

pcs.text: Select and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for handling, collecting, sorting, packing and storing eggs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for handling, collecting, sorting, packing and storing eggs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for handling, collecting, sorting, packing and storing eggs.

pcs.text: Check work area and equipment are clean and ready for operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check work area and equipment are clean and ready for operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check work area and equipment are clean and ready for operation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to handle eggs

elements.title: Collect and sort eggs

pcs.text: Ensure nests and egg belts are free of sick, injured or dead birds and other obstructions using safe and low stress animal handling techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure nests and egg belts are free of sick, injured or dead birds and other obstructions using safe and low stress animal handling techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure nests and egg belts are free of sick, injured or dead birds and other obstructions using safe and low stress animal handling techniques.

pcs.text: Collect eggs manually or mechanically from nesting system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect eggs manually or mechanically from nesting system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect eggs manually or mechanically from nesting system.

pcs.text: Collect floor eggs and keep separate
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect floor eggs and keep separate?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect floor eggs and keep separate.

pcs.text: Operate egg handling equipment and control flow of eggs according to enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate egg handling equipment and control flow of eggs according to enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate egg handling equipment and control flow of eggs according to enterprise procedures.

pcs.text: Remove very dirty, cracked, leaking or weak-shelled eggs manually or mechanically
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove very dirty, cracked, leaking or weak-shelled eggs manually or mechanically?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove very dirty, cracked, leaking or weak-shelled eggs manually or mechanically.

pcs.text: Wash eggs as required using approved sanitisers and temperatures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Wash eggs as required using approved sanitisers and temperatures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Wash eggs as required using approved sanitisers and temperatures.

pcs.text: Sort eggs into settable and non-settable and categories within each
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Sort eggs into settable and non-settable and categories within each?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Sort eggs into settable and non-settable and categories within each.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Collect and sort eggs

elements.title: Pack and store eggs

pcs.text: Place eggs on appropriate trays with pointed end down
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place eggs on appropriate trays with pointed end down?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place eggs on appropriate trays with pointed end down.

pcs.text: Assemble and stack trays in categories, and label according to enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assemble and stack trays in categories, and label according to enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble and stack trays in categories, and label according to enterprise procedures.

pcs.text: Transfer eggs to storage in order of age, category or dispatch order
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transfer eggs to storage in order of age, category or dispatch order?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transfer eggs to storage in order of age, category or dispatch order.

pcs.text: Operate egg storage facilities and/or cool rooms according to enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate egg storage facilities and/or cool rooms according to enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate egg storage facilities and/or cool rooms according to enterprise procedures.

pcs.text: Fumigate eggs if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Fumigate eggs if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fumigate eggs if required.

pcs.text: Separate all eggs selected for human consumption according to state/territory legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Separate all eggs selected for human consumption according to state/territory legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Separate all eggs selected for human consumption according to state/territory legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Complete records according to enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete records according to enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete records according to enterprise requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Pack and store eggs

elements.title: Clean and/or sanitise work areas and equipment

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks, and control and/or report risks associated with cleaning and/or sanitising work areas and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks, and control and/or report risks associated with cleaning and/or sanitising work areas and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks, and control and/or report risks associated with cleaning and/or sanitising work areas and equipment.

pcs.text: Select and fit appropriate PPE required for cleaning and/ or sanitising
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and fit appropriate PPE required for cleaning and/ or sanitising?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and fit appropriate PPE required for cleaning and/ or sanitising.

pcs.text: Measure chemicals and prepare cleaning fluids safely according to supplier instructions and enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure chemicals and prepare cleaning fluids safely according to supplier instructions and enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure chemicals and prepare cleaning fluids safely according to supplier instructions and enterprise procedures.

pcs.text: Check and prepare cleaning equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and prepare cleaning equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and prepare cleaning equipment.

pcs.text: Clean and disinfect or sanitise egg belts/conveyors, equipment and work area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and disinfect or sanitise egg belts/conveyors, equipment and work area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and disinfect or sanitise egg belts/conveyors, equipment and work area.

pcs.text: Check, clean and sanitise cool room and related equipment if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check, clean and sanitise cool room and related equipment if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check, clean and sanitise cool room and related equipment if required.

pcs.text: Take and prepare swab and/or samples for testing as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take and prepare swab and/or samples for testing as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take and prepare swab and/or samples for testing as required.

pcs.text: Dispose of non-settable eggs and waste according to enterprise biosecurity and environmental procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of non-settable eggs and waste according to enterprise biosecurity and environmental procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of non-settable eggs and waste according to enterprise biosecurity and environmental procedures.

pcs.text: Check for pests, vermin and/or predators and implement controls if required, according to enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check for pests, vermin and/or predators and implement controls if required, according to enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check for pests, vermin and/or predators and implement controls if required, according to enterprise procedures.

pcs.text: Complete records and report issues promptly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete records and report issues promptly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete records and report issues promptly.
